message:
fix: validate optimization and test updates

- Optimize validateCommand to skip LLM when no evidence exists (accepts
  with caution directly, saving API calls)
- Add E2E test for no-evidence draft scenario
- Update validate-command tests to match new behavior
- Fix diary validateSessionPath to use path.resolve
- Fix duplicate contribution text in README

All 2,255 tests passing.
